summary: Verified both UI fixes from iteration 1 follow-up. (1) VISI card now renders with dark green background (#2D4A3E -> rgb(45,74,62)) and white quote text. (2) Kontak form has noValidate attribute and empty submit correctly triggers sonner toast 'Mohon lengkapi nama, subjek, dan pesan'. Backend retest skipped per request.
critical_code_review_comments: Use of Tailwind important modifier `!bg-[#2D4A3E]` works but is a code-smell signal that .heritage-card global CSS is too aggressive. Consider scoping .heritage-card defaults (e.g., make background a CSS variable with low specificity) so utility classes can override without `!`.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both targeted fixes verified via Playwright against public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. VISI card computed bg = rgb(45,74,62), text color rgba(255,255,255,0.95). Kontak form: form.noValidate === true, empty submit triggers [data-sonner-toast] with expected Indonesian text. Screenshots stored at .screenshots/visi_card.png and .screenshots/empty_submit_toast.png.
rca of the issue: Iteration 1 root causes: (1) global .heritage-card class declared a light background with higher specificity than Tailwind's bg-[#2D4A3E] utility, causing white-on-white. Mitigated by adding Tailwind `!` important modifier. (2) Required inputs combined with default form submit triggered native browser validation before React onSubmit could fire toast. Mitigated by adding `noValidate` to <form>.
